His reporting focuses on elections, national security, and institutional affairs, tracking the decisions and conflicts that shape public life.

articles.title: Son caught cheating, cop ‘vandalises’ Dehradun college office, threatens teachers
articles.summary: A police sub-inspector and four associates allegedly stormed a Dehradun polytechnic college, vandalizing property and threatening staff after his son was caught cheating. CCTV footage captured both the cheating incident and the subsequent alleged assault.

articles.title: Mosque, mazar, 2 temples: Jaipur sees internet curbs before anti-encroachment drive
articles.summary: Mobile internet services, including social media, have been suspended for 24 hours in Jaipur North and East districts ahead of a JDA anti-encroachment drive. The drive aims to remove five religious structures to widen the Nandpuri Underpass.

articles.title: Karnataka PGCET 2026 hall ticket released at cetonline.karnataka.gov.in; direct link to download here
articles.summary: The Karnataka Examinations Authority (KEA) has released the hall ticket for the Karnataka PGCET 2026 for MBA and MCA admissions. Candidates can download their admit cards from etonline.karnataka.gov.in using their application number and name.

articles.title: IP University to conduct second offline counselling for BTech Lateral entry admissions on June 9: Check details here
articles.summary: Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University has announced the second offline counselling round for admission to its BTech Lateral Entry programme for BSc graduates. The counselling, scheduled for June 9, will be conducted for Programme Code 129.

articles.title: Maharashtra HSC, SSC supplementary exam 2026 hall ticket releasing today: Steps to download Class 10, 12 admit card
articles.summary: Maharashtra Board is releasing supplementary exam hall tickets for Class 10 and 12 today, June 8. Students can get their admit cards from mahahsscboard.in.

articles.title: UP Home Guard result date and time: Check steps to download and complete details here
articles.summary: The Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment and Promotion Board is likely to announce the UP Home Guard Result 2026 in the coming days. With the answer key objection process now over, candidates who took the examination in April are awaiting their scorecards.
